items.title: Bank ETFs in Red Over the Past Month: Pain or Gain Ahead? (Revised)
items.description: Bank ETFs like IYG, IYF, KBWB, XLF and VFH dip on credit jitters. Are gains ahead as Q3 earnings & a steepening yield curve offer hope?

items.title: Goldman Posts Solid Growth in Q3 IB Fees: Will the Trend Continue?
items.description: GS records a 42.5% surge in Q3 2025 IB fees, fueled by robust M&A activity and rising advisory revenues.

items.title: Jim Cramer Says “You’re in Fantastic Shape Owning Goldman”
items.description: The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE:GS) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer was focused on recently. When a caller mentioned that they have diversified their portfolio by investing in the stock, Cramer stated: “Oh my god, that is so right. Goldman Sachs is so cheap, and David Solomon’s doing such a good job. At […]

items.title: Q3 Earnings Season Kicks Off: Major Banks Thrive While Regional Lenders Signal Trouble
items.description: Better-than-expected results from big banks lift S&P 500 EPS growth for Q3 2025 to 8.5%.

items.title: Inside Dow Jones: Key Earnings Ahead for Some of the Index YTD Winners
items.author: Christine Short
items.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average's top performers in 2025 include Caterpillar, Johnson & Johnson, and NVIDIA, with key earnings reports upcoming that could impact their year-to-date performance.
